commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
Rename 23 top-referenced LABEL_ routines to semantic names

Renamed the 23 most frequently referenced unnamed labels (14-24 refs each):
- 4 RET stubs: MIDI_PostSendStub, AccPatch_NullReturn, etc.
- 10 return-zero stubs: AppEvent_ReturnZero, DpDocTtl_ReturnZero, etc.
- 9 shared epilogues: DSPCfg_Epilogue, FileIO_Epilogue, MIDI_SendEpilogue, etc.
431 lines changed in main CPU source, 23 in symbols reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Seurat/SeuratObject version: install SeuratObject 5.3.0 before Seurat 5.4.0

The bioconductor_docker:3.18 base image ships SeuratObject 5.0.1.
The previous iv() helper used upgrade="never" + dependencies=FALSE,
so SeuratObject was never upgraded, causing Seurat to fall back to
5.0.3 instead of 5.4.0. Now both packages use upgrade="always" +
dependencies=TRUE to ensure proper version resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

P4Runtime: close all 6 untested compliance gaps (#237)

## Summary

Brings P4Runtime compliance from 79/92 to 85/92 tested requirements —
zero
untested items remaining (the 7 unimplemented items are tracked
separately).

- **Table capacity enforcement (§9.27):** `RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED` when a
table
exceeds its p4info `size` limit. MODIFY/DELETE still work on full
tables.
- **Group max_size enforcement (§9.37):** `RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED` when an
action
  profile group exceeds `max_group_size` from p4info.
- **Write batch ordering (§9.28):** Test confirming updates within a
single
`WriteRequest` are applied sequentially (INSERT then MODIFY of the same
key).
- **Multi-controller arbitration (§10.2–10.4):** Higher `election_id`
becomes
primary; non-primary writes get `PERMISSION_DENIED`; all controllers may
read.
  Backward-compatible: writes without prior arbitration still succeed.
- **CI:** Coverage temporarily disabled for PRs (main-only) while
reliability
  is improved.

## Test plan

- [x] `TableStoreTest`: 6 new capacity/max_size unit tests
- [x] `P4RuntimeServiceTest`: 8 new `compareUint128` unsigned-arithmetic
tests
- [x] `P4RuntimeConformanceTest`: 7 new conformance tests (#39–45)
- [x] All existing tests pass (`bazel test //...
--test_tag_filters=-heavy`)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
feat(aliases): add dedicated detect endpoint replacing unreliable sync backfill

The 150-call sequential backfill inside sync was timing out and failing
silently. Replaced with POST /api/gmail/aliases/detect that:
- Fetches 10 inbox + 10 sent Upwork messages per account in parallel
- Uses awaited pool.query inserts (confirmed, not fire-and-forget)
- Returns detected count + full alias list in one response

Settings UI now has a "Detect from Gmail" button that calls the endpoint
and shows a toast with how many new aliases were found.

Fix: TradingDbContext.cs was gitignored due to data/ matching Data/ on Windows

The .gitignore had 'data/' which on Windows (case-insensitive fs) matched
the Data/ source folder, so TradingDbContext.cs was never committed.
Fixed by scoping to '/data/' (repo root only) and force-adding the file.

Add credit-based pricing system with reserve/refund pattern, Agency Pro tier, and credit packs (#320) (#320)

Implements a unified credit system that tracks every generation action (image=1cr, video=5cr, text=0.5cr, analysis=1cr), enforces limits atomically via reserve-then-refund pattern, and provides overage options through credit packs and plan upgrades. Adds Agency Pro tier ($449/mo, 1500 credits, 20 ad accounts), extra ad account block purchasing, Veo Fast cost reduction (62.5%), and credit display across Dashboard, Sidebar, Billing, and SalesLanding.

commit.message:
feat(backends): per-agent credential resolution from OAuth store (#259) (#410)

Allow HttpLlmBackend to start without a global LLM_API_KEY by supporting
"credential-required" mode — per-job OAuth credentials from
agent_credential_binding supply the API key at execution time.

Key changes:
- HttpLlmBackend.start() no longer rejects when no API key is configured;
  the backend starts and relies on per-job llmCredential overrides.
- On 401 from the LLM provider, the backend transparently refreshes the
  OAuth token via a TokenRefresher callback and retries the current turn
  once before failing.
- CredentialService.getAccessToken() gains a forceRefresh option to
  bypass the 5-minute expiry buffer (used by the 401 retry path).
- agent-execute.ts builds and passes a TokenRefresher when an
  agent_credential_binding is resolved.

commit.message:
Expand skill to cover all 7 JSON prompting domains

Previously image/video-only. Now covers:
1. Image Generation (Nano Banana, GPT-Image, Flux, Midjourney, SD)
2. Video Generation (Veo 3, Sora 2, Runway, Kling)
3. LLM Structured Output (data extraction, content gen, classification,
   meeting summaries, bug triage, API formatting)
4. Product Photography (packshots, lifestyle, flat lay, hero shots)
5. UI/UX Mockups (device frames, design systems, layout specs)
6. Commercial Advertising (brand guidelines, text overlays, CTAs)
7. Batch/Programmatic Generation (variable templates, SKU catalogs,
   platform adaptation, language localization, A/B testing)

Added 7 new examples (9-15) covering LLM and batch domains.
Added LLM and batch field references to schemas.
Total: 15 examples across all domains, ~2000 lines.
